media_base_path.label: Media base path
media_base_path.hint: Absolute path to the folder containing images and videos. All subfolders up to 5 levels deep are included recursively.

media_list_update_interval.label: Media list refresh interval
media_list_update_interval.hint: How often to rebuild the media list (in seconds, minimum 60). Especially important when using random order.

media_order.label: Playback order
media_order.hint: Determines the order in which images and videos are displayed.

display_time_image.label: Display time per image (seconds)
display_time_image.hint: How many seconds each image is shown before transitioning to the next.

display_time_video.label: Display time per video (seconds)
display_time_video.hint: How many seconds each video is shown. If the video is shorter, it will loop until this time is reached.

crossfade_time.label: Crossfade duration (seconds)
crossfade_time.hint: Duration of the crossfade transition between media items. Set to 0 to disable crossfade.

image_fit.label: Image fit mode
image_fit.hint: How images are scaled to fill the screen.

options.contain: Contain (show full image, may show black bars)

ken_burns_enabled.label: Enable Ken Burns effect
ken_burns_enabled.hint: Slowly pans and zooms images and videos for a cinematic effect.

ken_burns_zoom.label: Ken Burns zoom factor
ken_burns_zoom.hint: Maximum zoom level during the Ken Burns effect (e.g. 1.3 = 130% of original size). Range: 1.0 – 2.0.

video_volume.label: Video volume
video_volume.hint: Playback volume for videos. 0 = muted, 1 = full volume.

video_loop.label: Loop videos
video_loop.hint: If enabled, videos will loop until the configured display time is reached.

show_progress_bar.label: Show progress bar
show_progress_bar.hint: Displays a thin progress line at the bottom of the screen indicating the remaining display time.

show_image_info.label: Show info overlay
show_image_info.hint: Displays image metadata (filename, date, location) as an overlay on the slideshow.

image_info_template.label: Info overlay template
image_info_template.hint: HTML template for the info overlay. Use template variables like ${filename}, ${DateTimeOriginal}, ${address.city} to insert metadata. Click the help button for full reference.

info_position.label: Overlay position
info_position.hint: Where on the screen the info overlay is displayed.

fetch_address_data.label: Fetch location from GPS
fetch_address_data.hint: Reverse-geocodes GPS coordinates from image EXIF data using the Nominatim API (OpenStreetMap). Requires an internet connection.

geocoding_language.label: Place name language
geocoding_language.hint: Language for reverse-geocoded place names (country, city, etc.). Independent of the admin UI language.

exclude_filenames.label: Exclude filenames
exclude_filenames.hint:
Enter or comma adds a new entry.
Files matching any of these patterns will be excluded from the slideshow. Supports exact filenames or regular expressions.

exclude_folders.label: Exclude folders
exclude_folders.hint:
Enter or comma adds a new entry.
Folders matching any of these patterns will be skipped entirely (including all their contents). Matches the folder name, not the full path.

debug_mode.label: Enable debug mode
debug_mode.hint: Shows a debug overlay with EXIF metadata, GPS coordinates, resolved address data, and version information.

admin_pin.label: Admin PIN protection
admin_pin.hint: Protect the admin panel with an alphanumeric PIN (minimum 4 characters). Leave empty to disable protection.

log.title: Server Log
log.noErrors: No errors recorded — server is running clean.

status.savedRestartHint: Settings saved — please restart the server to apply.

pin.title: Admin PIN Protection
pin.noPin: No PIN protection active. Anyone can access this admin panel.
pin.pinTooShort: PIN must be at least 4 characters.
pin.pinInvalidChars: PIN may only contain letters and numbers.
pin.loginPrompt: This admin panel is protected with a PIN.
pin.forgotHint: Edit the config file on the server:

system.restartConfirm: Are you sure you want to restart the server? The slideshow will be briefly unavailable.
system.reloadNote: Opens the slideshow in a new browser tab.
system.dockerStopHint: To permanently stop the container, use: docker stop <containername>
system.updateAvailable: New version v{v} available on GitHub!
system.restartBanner: Settings saved — please restart the server to apply changes.
